untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic swing high/low tracking with reversal threshold calibrated to prior swing magnitude. This requires state management of swing structure (prior swing highs/lows, swing magnitudes, horizontal line plotting) and dynamic threshold calculation that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. Specifically missing: (1) ability to track and store swing highs/lows across bars, (2) ability to calculate swing magnitude as a dynamic reference point, (3) ability to set and maintain horizontal support/resistance lines dynamically, (4) reversal_multiple and min_prior_swing_points parameters are not quantified in source material.
translation_notes: This signal describes a market structure/swing analysis approach that requires stateful tracking of price extrema and dynamic threshold adjustment. The allowed indicator set (technical overlays and oscillators) cannot capture the procedural nature of swing identification and structure plotting. Attempted proxy using ATR as volatility measure, but this does not capture the core logic of reversal magnitude relative to prior specific swing structure.
